languages.text: {n}Себериан напоминает статую самого себя: голова гордо взернута, плечи расправлены, а полы тяжелого плаща трепещут от ветра. Он окидывает собравшуюся свиту решительным взглядом, дожидаясь, пока все внимание будет направлено на него, и, наконец, говорит. Усиленный вокс-синтезатором голос разносится по площади:{/n} "Соратники! Служители Священных Ордосов попрали заветы Бога-Императора. Инквизитор аф Иррамон посягнул на жизнь Вольного Торговца и честь его верных слуг! За это враг примет смерть от моей руки".

traits.locale_text: {n}Себериан напоминает статую самого себя: голова гордо взернута, плечи расправлены, а полы тяжелого плаща трепещут от ветра. Усиленный вокс-синтезатором голос разносится по площади:{/n} "Соратники! Служители Священных Ордосов попрали заветы Бога-Императора. Инквизитор аф Иррамон посягнул на жизнь Вольного Торговца и честь его верных слуг! За это враг примет смерть от моей руки".

languages.text: {n}Seberian looks like a statue of himself, head held high, shoulders thrown back, with the folds of his heavy cloak rippling in the wind. He watches his assembled entourage with a resolute gaze, waiting for everyone's attention before he finally speaks. His vox-synth-enhanced voice carries across the square:{/n} "Allies! The servants of the Holy Ordos have ridden roughshod over the covenants of the God-Emperor. Inquisitor af Irramon has threatened the life of the Rogue Trader and the dignity of his loyal servants! For this, the enemy will die by my hand."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安昂首挺胸，披风厚重的褶皱在风中翻涌，宛如一尊雕像。他以坚毅的目光扫视集结的随从，待众人的注意力集中过来，他才终于开口——那经由音阵合成器放大的声音，在广场之上回荡：{/n}“诸位盟友！神圣审判庭的仆从粗暴地践踏了神皇圣约！审判官阿夫·伊拉蒙不仅威胁行商浪人的性命，更玷污了其忠仆的尊严！为此，我定亲手斩杀此敌！”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian looks like a statue of himself, head held high, shoulders thrown back, with the folds of his heavy cloak rippling in the wind. He watches his assembled entourage with a resolute gaze, waiting for everyone's attention before he finally speaks. His vox-synth-enhanced voice carries across the square:{/n} "Allies! The servants of the Holy Ordos have ridden roughshod over the covenants of the God-Emperor. Inquisitor af Irramon has threatened the life of the Rogue Trader and the dignity of his loyal servants! For this, the enemy will die by my hand."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安昂首挺胸，披风厚重的褶皱在风中翻涌，宛如一尊雕像。他以坚毅的目光扫视集结的随从，待众人的注意力集中过来，他才终于开口——那经由音阵合成器放大的声音，在广场之上回荡：{/n}“诸位盟友！神圣审判庭的仆从粗暴地践踏了神皇圣约！审判官阿夫·伊拉蒙不仅威胁行商浪人的性命，更玷污了其忠仆的尊严！为此，我定亲手斩杀此敌！”

languages.text: {n}Seberian est immobile comme une statue, la tête haute, les épaules en arrière, sa lourde cape battue par le vent. Il observe son entourage réuni devant lui avec une détermination absolue, attendant d'avoir l'attention de chacun pour enfin se mettre à parler. Sa voix transmise par synthétiseur-vox résonne sur la place :{/n} « Alliés ! Les serviteurs du Saint Ordo piétinent avec mépris toutes les règles de l'Empereur-Dieu. L'inquisiteur af Irramon a menacé la vie du libre-marchand et la dignité de ses serviteurs fidèles ! Et ça, l'ennemi le paiera de sa vie face à moi. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian looks like a statue of himself, head held high, shoulders thrown back, with the folds of his heavy cloak rippling in the wind. He watches his assembled entourage with a resolute gaze, waiting for everyone's attention before he finally speaks. His vox-synth-enhanced voice carries across the square:{/n} "Allies! The servants of the Holy Ordos have ridden roughshod over the covenants of the God-Emperor. Inquisitor af Irramon has threatened the life of the Rogue Trader and the dignity of his loyal servants! For this, the enemy will die by my hand."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian est immobile comme une statue, la tête haute, les épaules en arrière, sa lourde cape battue par le vent. Il observe son entourage réuni devant lui avec une détermination absolue, attendant d'avoir l'attention de chacun pour enfin se mettre à parler. Sa voix transmise par synthétiseur-vox résonne sur la place :{/n} « Alliés ! Les serviteurs du Saint Ordo piétinent avec mépris toutes les règles de l'Empereur-Dieu. L'inquisiteur af Irramon a menacé la vie du libre-marchand et la dignité de ses serviteurs fidèles ! Et ça, l'ennemi le paiera de sa vie face à moi. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian parece una estatua de sí mismo, con la cabeza erguida, los hombros echados atrás y su pesada capa ondeando al viento. Observa a sus seguidores reunidos con una mirada decidida, esperando a que todos atiendan antes de hablar. Su voz, amplificada por el voco sintetizador, recorre la plaza:{/n} «¡Aliados! Los sirvientes de los Santos Ordos han pisoteado los pactos del Dios Emperador. ¡El Inquisidor af Irramon ha amenazado la vida de un Comerciante Independiente y la dignidad de sus fieles sirvientes! Por eso, acabaré personalmente con el enemigo».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian looks like a statue of himself, head held high, shoulders thrown back, with the folds of his heavy cloak rippling in the wind. He watches his assembled entourage with a resolute gaze, waiting for everyone's attention before he finally speaks. His vox-synth-enhanced voice carries across the square:{/n} "Allies! The servants of the Holy Ordos have ridden roughshod over the covenants of the God-Emperor. Inquisitor af Irramon has threatened the life of the Rogue Trader and the dignity of his loyal servants! For this, the enemy will die by my hand."

Por eso, acabaré personalmente con el enemigo».

languages.text: {n}Seberian; başı dik, omuzları geride, rüzgârda dalgalanan ağır pelerininin kıvrımlarıyla âdeta kendi heykeli gibi görünüyor. Toplanan maiyetine kararlı bir bakışla süzüyor, herkesin dikkatini vermesin bekledikten sonra nihayet konuşmaya başlıyor. Voks sentezleyiciyle güçlendirilmiş sesi, meydanda yankılanıyor.{/n} "Müttefiklerim! Kutsal Nizam'ın hizmetkârları, Tanrı İmparator'un ahitlerini hiçe saydı. Engizitör af İrramon, Hür Tacir'in hayatını ve sadık hizmetkârlarının onurunu tehdit etti! Bunun için düşmanımız ellerimde can verecek."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian looks like a statue of himself, head held high, shoulders thrown back, with the folds of his heavy cloak rippling in the wind. He watches his assembled entourage with a resolute gaze, waiting for everyone's attention before he finally speaks. His vox-synth-enhanced voice carries across the square:{/n} "Allies! For this, the enemy will die by my hand."

Engizitör af İrramon, Hür Tacir'in hayatını ve sadık hizmetkârlarının onurunu tehdit etti! Bunun için düşmanımız ellerimde can verecek."

languages.text: {n}Seberian wirkt wie eine Statue seiner selbst. Erhobenen Hauptes mit geschwellter Brust und seinem schweren, im Wind flatternden Mantel. Er betrachtet sein versammeltes Gefolge mit entschlossener Miene und wartet, eine Weile, ehe er schließlich das Wort ergreift. Seine mit einem Vox-Synthesizer verstärkte Stimme hallt über den Platz:{/n} "Verbündete! Die Diener der Heiligen Ordos haben die Gesetze des Gottimperators mit Füßen getreten. Inquisitor af Irramon hat das Leben des Freihändlers und die Würde seiner treuen Diener verletzt! Dafür wird der Feind durch meine Hand sterben."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian looks like a statue of himself, head held high, shoulders thrown back, with the folds of his heavy cloak rippling in the wind. He watches his assembled entourage with a resolute gaze, waiting for everyone's attention before he finally speaks. His vox-synth-enhanced voice carries across the square:{/n} "Allies! The servants of the Holy Ordos have ridden roughshod over the covenants of the God-Emperor. Inquisitor af Irramon has threatened the life of the Rogue Trader and the dignity of his loyal servants! For this, the enemy will die by my hand."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは、首を高く、肩を大きく引き、重厚なマントの襞が風になびく、まるで自分の像のようである。彼は集まった部下たちを毅然とした眼差しで注ぎ、皆の注意が向けられるまで待つ。そしてついに声を発する。彼のボイスシンセサイザーを強化した声は広場に響き渡る。{/n}「同盟者たちよ！聖オーロス神殿のしもべたちは、皇帝の契約を踏みにじった。イラモン検察官は、このローグ・トレーダーとその忠実なしもべの尊厳を脅かした！このため、敵は私の手で死を迎えよう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian looks like a statue of himself, head held high, shoulders thrown back, with the folds of his heavy cloak rippling in the wind. He watches his assembled entourage with a resolute gaze, waiting for everyone's attention before he finally speaks. His vox-synth-enhanced voice carries across the square:{/n} "Allies! The servants of the Holy Ordos have ridden roughshod over the covenants of the God-Emperor. Inquisitor af Irramon has threatened the life of the Rogue Trader and the dignity of his loyal servants! For this, the enemy will die by my hand."
